title: Daily Claim
description: Initialize your membership once a day to verify connectivity and claim your daily $BAG allocation.

title: Weekly Claim
description: Claim your 400 $BAG weekly allocation. Resets automatically 7 days after your claim.

title: Task 1
description: Complete the current Admin task on our official X account and paste the link below.

title: Task 2
description: Complete the secondary Admin task on our official X account and paste the link below.

title: Invite a Member
description: Successfully recruit a new member to the Network using your referral link. Earn 100 $BAG per verified recruit.
